sharedRules.name: Burst X
sharedRules.description: This ability starts with X burst charges. When ACTing, may repeat this ability again with the same ACT by spending a burst charge. This can make multiple attacks or choose different targets. Burst charges can be regained by various abilities. If burst is at 0, the ability cannot be used. Burst has a starting value listed and a maximum of 3.

sharedRules.name: Tithe Law
sharedRules.description: At the start of each round, each Volvadani necromancer must declare an active law from the list. Each Volvadani necromancer can only declare each law once per game, and each only lasts until the end of the round. Units that break the law gain a guilt token at the end of their turn. A guilt token is a negative token. A unit with at least one guilt token is considered a criminal. Volvadani abilities are stronger against criminals.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Roaring reload’s splash deals 1 fire damage to criminals after push

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Roaring reload creates a hazard in free adjacent spaces after it resolves.

characteristics.$text: 1 damage, then inflict 1 vulnerable against criminals.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: Adjacent foe gains 1 vulnerable and cannot exit a space adjacent to the Bobby until the Bobby is slain, the Bobby breaks adjacency for any reason, or the start of the Bobby’s next turn.

characteristics.name: Tags

characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: At the start of this unit’s turn, instead of using its regular passive, may move a guilt token from a foe in line of sight to any other foe in line of sight.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: When this unit is slain, it instead remains at 1 hp and becomes immune to all damage. At the end of its next turn, it is obliterated.

characteristics.name: Upgrade Effect
characteristics.$text: Deputize immediately allows a unit to step 2, ignoring adverse terrain and elevation penalties.

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: At turn start, may inflict 1 guilt on a foe in range 1-3.

characteristics.$text: Foe, range 2-4, Curse

characteristics.name: Effect

characteristics.name: Tags
characteristics.$text: Melee

characteristics.name: Effect
characteristics.$text: An adjacent criminal with 3+ guilt takes 1 or (6+) 2 devil damage. If this obliterates the criminal, the engine feeds on their sin. It may immediately may MOVE again and gains +1 burst charge per guilt on the criminal, distributed as it wishes.
